systems.name: Player Combat Kit Spec
systems.need: Lock light combo, heavy, Q, ultimate, Judgment meter, dash/cancel rules.
systems.acceptance: Spec accepted; no ambiguity about player buttons.

systems.name: Judgment Meter
systems.need: Meter gained from hits, kills, dodges/ripostes; spent by ultimate.
systems.acceptance: Visible in HUD; persists only during run; resets correctly.

systems.name: Q Ability: Penitent Riposte / Ashen Cleave
systems.need: Skill-expression ability; riposte preferred, cleave fallback.
systems.acceptance: Works in combat with placeholder VFX and cooldown.

systems.name: Ultimate: Judgment Break
systems.need: Full-meter execution slash with stagger/boss value.
systems.acceptance: Consumes meter, damages enemies, has readable windup/impact.

systems.name: Enemy Interaction Rebuild
systems.need: Stagger, knockback, vulnerability windows, Q/ultimate reactions.
systems.acceptance: First three enemies teach different responses.
systems.notes: T-006 adds placeholder stagger, vulnerability, hit reaction, and role-aware player ability interactions.

systems.name: Patron Data Schema
systems.need: Patron, boon, synergy, active run patron structures.
systems.acceptance: Data loads cleanly; not hardcoded in UI scripts.
systems.notes: T-007 added patron, boon, and synergy data schema. Runtime reward integration comes in T-008.

systems.name: Two Patrons Per Run
systems.need: First reward is always a boon; patrons are weighted reward sources; owned boons can generate upgrades. No two-patron lock.
systems.acceptance: First reward offers patron boons; later rewards can offer boons, upgrades, synergies, or neutral rewards.
systems.notes: Old two-patrons-per-run lock rejected. Replace with weighted boon reward pool in T-008.

systems.name: Chain Saint Boon Set
systems.need: Make Azazel boons affect combat through stagger/control/Q/heavy/ultimate hooks.
systems.acceptance: A Chain Saint build is recognizable in gameplay.
systems.notes: T-009 adds first placeholder Azazel combat mechanics.

systems.name: Furnace Mother Boon Set
systems.acceptance: Furnace playstyle is distinct and synergizes with Chain Saint.

systems.name: Blind Judge Boon Set
systems.acceptance: Judged state is visible and mechanically relevant.

systems.name: Patron Synergy Boons
systems.need: Rare boons unlocked by active patron pairs.

systems.name: Forge Marks V1
systems.need: Serrated Edge, Grave Weight, Ash Step affect weapon behavior.
systems.acceptance: Forge visit changes combat for the run.

systems.name: Weapon Ascension Choice
systems.need: Mid-run evolution into Martyr Blade, Warden Breaker, Ash Serpent Edge.
systems.acceptance: One of three ascensions meaningfully changes combat.

systems.name: Boon/Forge/Ascension UI Presentation
systems.acceptance: Player understands choices without debug text.

systems.name: Room Plate / Authored Room Loader
systems.need: Load room plate + sockets + collision mask.

systems.name: Ash Warden Visual Integration
systems.need: Replace boss placeholder with real boss art/animations.
systems.acceptance: Boss feels like a boss, not a large test enemy.

systems.name: Audio Replacement Pass
systems.need: Replace procedural noise with curated/usable SFX/music.
systems.acceptance: Important actions are readable through sound.

phases.title: Tracker and Folder Discipline
phases.goal: Create tracker docs/json/validator and folder discipline.

phases.title: Combat Kit Design Lock
phases.goal: Spec light/heavy/Q/ultimate/meter/dash/cancel rules.

phases.title: Combat Kit Logic Prototype
phases.goal: Implement combo, heavy, Q, ultimate, Judgment meter with placeholders.

phases.title: Enemy Interaction Logic Pass
phases.goal: Rebuild enemy stagger/knockback/vulnerability around new kit.

phases.title: Patron Data Schema
phases.goal: Data model for patrons, boons, synergies, active run state.

phases.title: Two Patrons Per Run
phases.goal: Exactly two active patrons in each run.

phases.title: First Patron: Chain Saint
phases.goal: Implement 8 Chain Saint boons.

phases.title: Second Patron: Furnace Mother + Synergy
phases.goal: Implement burn/ash boons + first synergies.

phases.title: Forge Marks Logic
phases.goal: Serrated Edge, Grave Weight, Ash Step.

phases.title: Weapon Ascension Logic
phases.goal: Martyr Blade, Warden Breaker, Ash Serpent Edge.

phases.title: Choice UI Presentation
phases.goal: Reward/patron/forge/ascension cards.

phases.title: Enemy Art Batch 1
phases.goal: Ash Grunt, Cinder Lunger, Ember Spitter.

phases.title: Ash Intake Hall Real Room
phases.goal: Room plate, collision, spawns, hazards, gates.

phases.title: Hazard Art States
phases.goal: Idle/warning/active/cooldown visuals.

phases.title: Support Room Function + Art
phases.goal: Reward/fountain/shop/forge become presentable.

phases.title: Enemy Art Batch 2
phases.goal: Chainbound, Imp, Bell Wretch.

phases.title: Remaining Combat Rooms
phases.goal: Five remaining combat rooms.

phases.title: Blind Judge + Full Synergies
phases.goal: Third patron and remaining synergy pairs.

phases.title: Ash Warden Art + Arena
phases.goal: Boss sprite, animations, arena, VFX.

phases.title: Hub Art + Progression Presentation
phases.goal: Hub station art and progression UI.

phases.title: Audio Replacement
phases.goal: Replace procedural noise with usable SFX/music.

phases.title: QA / Balance / Packaging
phases.goal: Stabilize, export, README, controls.
